title: elaeocarpus macrocerus
intro: Elaeocarpus macrocerus, also known as the Large-fruited Elaeocarpus or Red Bead Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the Elaeocarpaceae family, native to the tropical rainforests of Malaysia and Indonesia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as skin infections, wounds, and fever. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus macrocerus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Elaeocarpus macrocerus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
